name: Chicken Tot Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 package frozen mixed vegetable medley, such as broccoli, cauliflower and red bell peppers (16 oz.)
2 cups chopped cooked chicken or turkey
1 can condensed cream of mushroom soup, undiluted (10 3/4 oz.)
1 tablespoon chopped fresh thyme or 1 teaspoon dried thyme
1 package Hot Tots, Onion Tots or Tater Tots (about 4 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Add onions and cook for 5 minutes or until tender.
4. Add vegetables, chicken, soup, milk and thyme; bring mixture to a simmer, stirring frequently.
5. Pour mixture into an ungreased baking dish (11 x 17 inches) or 1 1/2-quart round casserole.
6. Arrange Tater Tots in a single layer over the chicken mixture.
7. Bake for about 45 minutes or until potatoes are golden brown and mixture is bubbly.
